title: Validity and Grounds for Revocation or Cancellation of Accreditation of Foreign Principals/Employers
content: The accreditation of foreign principals, employers or projects shall be valid for four (4) years unless sooner revoked or cancelled by the POEA. Grounds for revocation or cancellation of accreditation by the POEA include: (1) Expiration of the principal's business license; (2) Upon written mutual agreement by the parties to pre-terminate the Agreement; (3) False documentation or misrepresentation in connection with the application for accreditation; (4) Final judgment in a disciplinary action against the foreign principal.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
